text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! I've heard good news of your
numerous victories!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Brilliant! The light glistening from these trophies
is endless!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You're an especially rare specimen. I'm not sure
there has ever been a better trainer.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, better yet! There will never be another like
you either!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Dare to hope! My dream might just come true.
Keep up the great work!
